docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN VP TOWING AND QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT JOSEPH RAYMOND IMONTICORTES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-07-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. W. TRUPEK (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2020 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JOSEPH RAYMOND IMONTICORTES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING AND QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT JOSEPH RAYMOND INMONTICORTES IS PRESENT. THE CASE WAS HEARD AND PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT: DEFENDANT SIGNED A RELEASE OF HIS VEHICLE ON DMV FORM FOR HIS CAR IN POSSESSION OF AUTORETURN. THIS ACTION PAYS THE DEFENDANT'S DEBT IN FULL. THIS ACTION DOES NOT COVER THE 5 OUTSTANDING PARKING CITATIONS WITH THE CITY. THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT IMONTICORTES, JOSEPH RAYMOND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT IMONTICORTES, JOSEPH RAYMOND HEARING SET FOR MAR-05-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00) SERVED FEB-13-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT IMONTICORTES, JOSEPH RAYMOND
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUL-09-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IMONTICORTES, JOSEPH RAYMOND $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,685.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER MOTION TO VACATE IS GRANTED
